name: Duranti 2021 Acute Tadalafil Redox Polyamines Athletic Men Extract
population_or_context: Healthy men with high cardiorespiratory fitness after acute tadalafil ingestion.
methods: Pre-post biomarker study measuring plasma muscle-damage, redox, antioxidant enzyme, oxidative-target, and polyamine markers before and after tadalafil.
population_profile: Healthy fit men; relevant to athlete safety/recovery hypotheses but not a randomized performance endpoint.
tadalafil_exposure: Single tadalafil 20 mg dose with biomarker sampling before and 2, 6, and 24 hours afterward.
indication_context: Experimental healthy-athlete redox and muscle-damage biomarker study.
study_design: Uncontrolled acute pre-post human mechanistic study.
comparator_context: Within-person baseline; no placebo comparator in abstract.
safety_findings: CK and LDH increased 24 hours after tadalafil, with no antioxidant-status benefit observed.
directness_to_target_population: Moderate for acute biomarker response in fit men, low for clinical injury, recovery, strength, hypertrophy, or chronic dosing.
confounding_and_bias_limits: No placebo comparator, small sample, biomarker endpoints, single-dose exposure, and abstract-level extraction.
class_transfer_limits: Direct tadalafil evidence, but uncontrolled biomarker changes cannot establish performance or recovery benefit.
